sentence: Capquiche me once and I will know whether you are quichous or just performing it.

wombos.definition: To demand that someone give a quiche (quirky, niche) take or analysis — insisting on a genuinely odd, specific, personal opinion rather than a generic one. 'Capquiche me on this.'
Quirky and niche, but also intriguingly curious — something that makes you want to know more. A step beyond quiche: not just odd, but fascinatingly odd.
